headline: Tax Refunds Are Here. Retail Stocks to Watch as People Sort Out Whether to Spend on Gas or Goodies.
summary: FEATURE  Man plans, god laughs. Retail investors are learning that lesson all over again. Just a few months ago, 2026 looked like it was going to be consumers’ time to shine: Tax changes meant bigger refunds were teed up, while policy watchers were hoping for potential interest-rate cuts and tariff relief.

headline: With Costco Down 7% From Its All-Time High, Could Buying Now Set You Up for Life?
summary: When it comes to the competitive retail sector, Costco is a clear leader.

headline: America's Greatest Opportunities: How Price Club Offered A Lesson On Fundamentals
summary: I saw my first Price Club in the summer of 1981 in San Diego. They only had two stores then, but I was impressed.

headline: Bipartisan Senators Push Hot Rotisserie Chicken Bill To Let SNAP Recipients Buy Ready-To-Eat Meals
summary: Bipartisan senators introduce bill to allow SNAP recipients to buy rotisserie chicken, citing affordability and practicality for families.
